title: AI-Powered Quiz Generator
description: Developed a Java Spring Boot application accepting PDF inputs and generating quizzes via an integrated Python ML pipeline. Implemented NLP-driven text extraction and question generation workflows. Containerised the system with Docker and achieved approximately 90% question relevance accuracy.

title: Procedural Dungeon Generator
description: Designed a multi-stage hybrid procedural dungeon generator integrating rectangular rooms, handcrafted prefabs, and BFS cave expansion. Achieved 100% dungeon connectivity across 100 test runs. Implemented evaluation metrics, CSV analytics, visualisation tools, animated GIF/MP4 outputs, and an interactive Jupyter Notebook interface with real-time parameter controls.

title: Verterra: Your World, Your Impact
description: Developed an educational XR simulation where users manipulate climate variables and observe environmental impacts across global regions. Implemented AR-based region placement mechanics inspired by geographic visualisation systems. Designed interconnected environmental simulation models demonstrating the effects of emissions, deforestation, ecosystem degradation, and restoration.

title: Website RAG Assistant
description: An AI-powered Retrieval-Augmented Generation assistant. Performs website crawling and semantic search utilizing a FAISS vector database. Built with Google Gemini, FastAPI backend, and Next.js frontend with a modern UI. Containerised with Docker and deployed on Vercel and Render, featuring accurate source citations.

title: AI Notes Converter
description: AI-powered note conversion tool with a beautiful animated interface. Features a robust OCR pipeline for PDF and image upload to generate accurate Markdown. Supports streaming responses and multiple LLM providers, with provider fallback between Google Gemini and NVIDIA NIM.

title: Haunted Maze
description: A procedural 3D maze game where the player must navigate a haunted environment, collect gems, and avoid roaming zombies. Features image-based procedural map generation using 2D textures, dynamic spawning of entities and lights with distance-maximization algorithms, immersive player mechanics with audio-visual feedback, and win/loss conditions based on gem collection and zombie encounters.
